landing.hero_subtitle: Track every fishing session, know the law for each canton, and log your catches — all in one app.
landing.features_title: Everything you need on the water
landing.feature_laws_desc: Select any point on the map and instantly see the fishing laws, permit requirements, and minimum catch sizes for that Swiss canton.
landing.feature_sessions_desc: Log fishing sessions with weather and water conditions. Track your progress over time — like Strava does for cycling and running.
landing.feature_catches_desc: Record every catch with species, length, weight, and release status. Build your complete fishing history across all sessions.
landing.feature_data_desc: All data stays on your device. Export your fishing history and import it again on any device.
landing.cantons_desc: Complete fishing regulations for every canton — from Zurich to Ticino.

map.click_instruction: Click on the map to select your fishing location
map.not_switzerland: No Swiss canton detected at this location. Please select a location within Switzerland.

sessions.title: Fishing Sessions
sessions.subtitle: Track your fishing trips, conditions, and catches.
sessions.no_sessions_desc: Start a new session to begin tracking your fishing adventures!

new_session.title: Start New Fishing Session
new_session.notes_placeholder: General notes about this fishing session…

catch.title: Catches
catch.no_catches: No catches logged yet. Click "Log Catch" to add one.

data.title: Data Management
data.import_confirm: This will replace all current data. Are you sure?
data.export_tooltip: Download all your fishing data as JSON
data.import_tooltip: Restore data from a previous export
